About Our School

A Sanctuary for Academic Excellence and Holistic Growth

County School Chuka is a Christian-centered girls-only boarding institution offering Junior and Senior Secondary education in the serene highlands of Tharaka-Nithi County — 3km from Chuka Town.

We are more than a school. We are an eco-community where every girl is nurtured academically, spiritually, morally, and socially in a safe and inspiring environment fed by fresh farm produce grown right on campus.

Academic Excellence
Christian Values
Eco-Community Life
Leadership & Innovation
School Farm & Dairy
Sports & Co-Curriculum
Discover More →
Why Parents Choose Us

Six Pillars of a Transformative Education

Discover what makes County School Chuka the premier choice for girls' education in Tharaka-Nithi County.

Academic Excellence

Rigorous CBC curriculum delivered by passionate educators committed to unlocking every girl's potential.

Award-Winning Spirit

Our girls consistently excel in regional and national competitions, bringing home trophies and recognition.

Eco-Sustainability

A self-sustaining campus with greenhouses and a school farm where students grow their own fresh produce.

Farm & Dairy Community

Our school dairy provides fresh milk daily, teaching students real-world responsibility and animal husbandry.

Well-Stocked Library

A rich library of resources supporting every subject, fostering a culture of reading, research and inquiry.

Sports & Active Life

From volleyball courts to athletics, our girls develop teamwork, discipline, and physical wellbeing every day.

News & Events

Latest from County School Chuka

Stay updated with achievements, events, and life at our school.

Achievement
2025

County School Chuka Wins Regional Trophy

Our students proudly received a prestigious award, a testament to their dedication, discipline, and the nurturing environment of our school.

Eco-Campus
2025

Greenhouse Expansion Boosts Farm Produce

Our school farm's new greenhouse is now yielding fresh vegetables year-round, nourishing our students daily.
